text.value: The code must be a two-digit number
If you are the only recorder on your team, this may be called a "team ID". Recorder ID is the 2-digit code assigned to you or your team.
Approximately, how many people live in this community/village?
Approximately how many eligible participants (6-7 ans) live in this community/village?
Eligible participants living in this community can't exceed the presents
GPS coordinates are easier to collect outside
date and time the recorder starts to fill the form
date and time the recorder starts to fill the form
